title: Protecting freshwater - Canada.ca
content:
## Protecting freshwater
Reporting under the regulations, wastewater pollution, data, environmental emergencies science and annual reports.

## Services and information

### Water governance and legislation
Federal legislation, annual reports, Red River, Poplar River, Souris River, Mackenzie River.
Research, policies and programs.
Regulations, reporting, data, wastewater management, agreements, and contacts.

### Creation of a Canada Water Agency: Stakeholder and Public Engagement
Efforts toward creating a new agency to enhance freshwater management across Canada.

### Science to support environmental emergencies
Guidance on the protection and treatment of freshwater shorelines.

### National Freshwater Science Agenda
A report on national freshwater science priorities to support and guide planning, collaboration, and coordination of freshwater science and knowledge in Canada.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
